DCs:
e1: clean(region_code: $region_code1, region_name: $region_name1, company_code: $company_code1, company_name: $company_name1, branch_code: $branch_code1, branch_name: $branch_name1, branch_address: $branch_address1, branch_post_code: $branch_post_code1, branch_start_date: $branch_start_date1, branch_end_date: $branch_end_date1, contract_type: $contract_type1, inventory_facility: $inventory_facility1, transaction_value: $transaction_value1, transaction_description: $transaction_description1), clean(region_code: $region_code2, region_name: $region_name2, company_code: $company_code2, company_name: $company_name2, branch_code: $branch_code2, branch_name: $branch_name2, branch_address: $branch_address2, branch_post_code: $branch_post_code2, branch_start_date: $branch_start_date2, branch_end_date: $branch_end_date2, contract_type: $contract_type2, inventory_facility: $inventory_facility2, transaction_value: $transaction_value2, transaction_description: $transaction_description2), $branch_code1 == $branch_code2, $branch_name1 != $branch_name2 -> #fail.
